summary: Comprehensive testing of Defense Industry Dashboard UI/UX redesign completed - All pages working with light theme, purple accents, and requested features

ui_bugs.issue: Width/height -1 console warnings on initial render
ui_bugs.description: Charts render correctly but show console warnings. Not user-visible.

issues: Some company logos fail to load (Clearbit CDN dependency) - fallback icons display correctly

passed_tests: Backend API: 27/27 tests passed (100%)
Dashboard: Light theme with rgb(248, 250, 252) background
Dashboard: Purple accents (#7E22CE) on active navigation
Dashboard: Key metrics displayed (Market Cap, Expenditure, Players, M&A)
Dashboard: Market Leaders table with company logos and country flags
Dashboard: Regional spending pie chart
Dashboard: Top Defense Budgets bar chart
Dashboard: Recent Intel announcements section
Market Data: 100 companies displayed with filtering and sorting
Market Data: Search by company/ticker working
Market Data: Country filter working
Market Data: Sort by market cap (high/low), change %, revenue, name
Market Data: Country flags displayed (100 flags)
Market Data: Top 10 by Market Cap chart
Expenditures: 30 countries with flags displayed
Expenditures: Top Spending Countries bar chart
Expenditures: Regional Distribution pie chart
Expenditures: Region filter working
Expenditures: Sort by expenditure and GDP %
Products: 102 products displayed (enriched from 25)
Products: Category filter (aircraft, naval, land, missile, cyber, space)
Products: Manufacturer filter (16 manufacturers)
Products: Compare mode button present
Products: Product cards with status badges (ACTIVE, DEVELOPMENT)
Announcements: 37 announcements displayed
Announcements: Master-detail layout working
Announcements: Category filter working
Announcements: Search functionality working
M&A Activity: 17 deals displayed with company icons
M&A Activity: Status filter working (announced, pending, completed, cancelled)
M&A Activity: Deal values and types displayed
Regulations: 13 regulations displayed
Regulations: Accordion expand/collapse working
Regulations: Country flags displayed (13 flags)
Regulations: Category and country filters working
Regulations: Key requirements listed
Follow: 14 mock social media posts displayed
Follow: Platform tabs (All, X/Twitter, LinkedIn) working
Follow: X/Twitter: 8 posts, LinkedIn: 6 posts
Follow: Account type filter (Institutional, Company, Analyst, Media)
Follow: Demo Mode notice displayed (MOCK API indicator)
Navigation: All 8 navigation links working correctly
Navigation: Mobile menu toggle present
Navigation: Admin Panel link present
critical_code_review_comments: Recharts ResponsiveContainer shows dimension warnings - charts still render correctly, minor issue
Company logos depend on external Clearbit CDN - some fail to load, fallback icons handle gracefully

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All pages load, all features working

context_for_next_testing_agent: Major UI/UX redesign complete. Light theme with slate-50 background (#F8FAFC) and purple-700 accents (#7E22CE). Product portfolio enriched to 102 products. All pages have data-testid attributes for testing. Follow page uses MOCK data for Twitter/X and LinkedIn feeds.
mocked_apis_note: Follow page social media feed uses MOCK_TWITTER_POSTS and MOCK_LINKEDIN_POSTS - Twitter/X API not integrated
